flavorText: Wild Magic sorcerers tap chaotic arcana that produces unpredictable surges.

features.description: After casting a spell of 1st level or higher, roll a d20; on a 1, roll on the Wild Magic Surge table of 50 effects.
Gain advantage on one attack roll, ability check, or saving throw. The DM can then trigger a Wild Magic Surge to reset this feature.
Spend 2 Sorcery Points to roll 1d4 and add or subtract it from another creature's attack roll, ability check, or saving throw.
Whenever you roll on the Wild Magic Surge table, roll twice and choose either result.
When you roll damage for a spell and any die shows its maximum, roll one additional damage die and add it to the damage.

wild-magic-surge.summary: Unstable magic erupts around your spells, making every big cast feel thrilling and slightly dangerous.
wild-magic-surge.description: Wild Magic Surge is the subclass identity in one feature: explosive, unpredictable, and table-shaping. It should feel exciting, not like a hidden footnote.

wild-tides-of-chaos.summary: Bend fate toward success now, knowing the chaos may answer back later.
wild-tides-of-chaos.description: Tides of Chaos is the best expression of this subclass’s bargain: immediate advantage in exchange for inviting the storm to come looking for you later.

wild-bend-luck.summary: Spend sorcery to skew another creature’s roll at the last second.
wild-bend-luck.description: Bend Luck is a clutch manipulation button. It lets the wild mage interfere with fate directly, which is exactly what this subclass should feel like when chaos is under partial control.

wild-controlled-chaos.summary: You do not remove the chaos—you steer it into outcomes that are less likely to ruin your own plans.
wild-controlled-chaos.description: Controlled Chaos is a maturity point for the subclass. The magic is still wild, but now the sorcerer feels like someone surfing the wave instead of being dragged by it.

wild-spell-bombardment.summary: When your spell hits hard, unstable force can cascade into even more punishment.
wild-spell-bombardment.description: Spell Bombardment is the wild mage’s late-game payoff: the subclass remains swingy, but the highs become genuinely explosive.
